label: Transparent Newt motif
workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to RGBA PNG.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated newt body for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A woodland-pool newt with accurate amphibian anatomy: slender olive-brown body, fine granular moist skin texture, low dorsal ridge, small limbs and toes, long tapering tail, dark mottled back, warm orange belly visible along a graceful slight side twist, subtle moss-neutral undertones, crisp silhouette edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete full-body cutout with generous padding; do not crop snout, toes, or tail. Show enough underside twist to reveal the orange belly accent while keeping the natural newt profile readable.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves olive brown back, orange belly, moss-neutral highlights, and natural moist skin detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no leaves, no water, no rocks, no second animal, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Newt" / "Newt" derived from the provided newt body motif cutout.
Reference use: Use the newt image visible in this conversation as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the olive-brown granular back, warm orange belly, dark mottling, moist skin highlights, and mossy woodland-pool neutrals. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the woodland pool context.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Newt", motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; modern sans product typography, tabular numbers, compact field-system labels.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible adaptive field-system product UI, precise grid, crisp interface mockup, 8px radii, dense operational dashboard feel, subtle newt-skin granular texture, tail-curve dividers, mottled map-like field panels, woodland-pool calm.
Color palette: pale moss surface, deep peat ink, olive-brown primary, moss green secondary, orange belly accent, amber status, wet-skin highlight, clay brown border, lichen muted neutral. No unrelated colors.
UI coverage details: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, left sidebar navigation, top nav, adaptive field dashboard chart cards, line chart, bar chart, small map/status panel, KPI cards, form validation, loading/empty/error/success states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Text: short readable UI labels only; examples include Field Map, Pool Status, Transect, Moisture, Active, Alert, Review, Search, Submit, Cancel, Newt Index. No paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated bright colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no stock website hero layout, no illegible text.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Newt" / "Newt". It must feel like the same adaptive field system translated from the light board visible in this conversation, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the newt motif and the light-mode design-system board visible in this conversation as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, granular newt-skin texture, tail-curve dividers, 8px radii, adaptive field dashboard layout, component language, spacing, typography guidance, charts, table, forms, status states, and navigation.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160, clean product design-system reference sheet.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, generous whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Newt", Dark Mode, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
Visual details: dark background derived from deepest peat ink and wet woodland-pool shadow; text from pale moss surface and wet highlights; olive-brown primary, moss green secondary, warm orange belly accent for focus/warning/status, clay brown borders, lichen muted panels. Use subtle granular skin texture and mottled field-map pattern crops inside token swatches.
UI coverage details: icon buttons, primary and secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command palette, search field, left sidebar navigation, top nav, adaptive field dashboard chart cards, line chart, bar chart, small map/status panel, KPI cards, form validation, loading/empty/error/success states, spacing/radius/shadow token swatches.
Typography: English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with short examples; modern sans product typography, tabular numbers, compact field-system labels.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dark product UI, precise grid, crisp operational dashboard, 8px radii everywhere, restrained contrast, woodland-pool night mood.
Text: short readable UI labels only; examples include Field Map, Pool Status, Transect, Moisture, Active, Alert, Review, Search, Submit, Cancel, Newt Index. No paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no watermark, no stock website hero layout, no illegible text.
